channel.title: Reposts on Casa de JuJu
channel.description: Recent content in Reposts on Casa de JuJu

item.title: Bitcoin's purpose
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Julian Darío Gutierrez)
item.description: Bitcoin as digital gold is a blasphemic statement. Original post available here Bitcoin’s purpose is crystal clear. Satoshi Nakamoto’s whitepaper, “Bitcoin: A Peer-to-Peer Electronic Cash System,” explicitly outlines Bitcoin as digital cash. The whitepaper discusses creating a decentralized currency for everyday transactions, not a store of value like digital gold. Read the whitepaper and see for yourself. 1/ The title of the whitepaper itself - “Bitcoin: A Peer-to-Peer Electronic Cash System” - states the purpose directly: Bitcoin was meant to be used as cash.

item.title: Nothing going on
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Julian Darío Gutierrez)
item.description: It’s all so simple. Original post available here It’s attractive when a woman has nothing going on in her life and a man is her priority. It’s not attractive when a man has nothing going on in his life and a woman is his priority.

item.title: Gaslightning
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Julian Darío Gutierrez)
item.description: It must be in your head, riiite? "Gaslightning" ⛽️⚡️ When people tell you that the Bitcoin Lightning Network actually works great, and all of its numerous user experience issues are all in your head. — Joel Valenzuela (@TheDesertLynx) October 27, 2024

item.title: The modern world is a massive scam
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Julian Darío Gutierrez)
item.description: sunscreen destroys your skin casual sex destroys sexuality banks destroys wealth news destroys information schools destroy intelligence heart healthy oils destroy your heart veganism destroys the planet feminism destroys femininity the modern world is a massive scam — Carnivore Aurelius ©🥩 ☀️🦙 (@AlpacaAurelius) March 10, 2025

item.title: Men are solar, Women are lunar
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Julian Darío Gutierrez)
item.description: Could be an idea to respect your natural cycles. Original post available here Men are solar, women are lunar. Men have a 24 hour testosterone testosterone cycle which peaks in the morning and declines through the day. Women have a 28 day hormonal cycle that changes with the 28 day cycle of the moon. Men are meant to work hard in the morning and around lunch time and relax later in the day.

item.title: The end of ideology
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Julian Darío Gutierrez)
item.description: It is not about left or right dogma anymore. It is about whether you are a centralist or a decentralist, a gigantist or minimalist. The end of ideology means embracing open societies that offer "political" choice and experimentation sandboxes. — Sterlin Lujan (@SterlinLujan) May 9, 2025

item.title: At your funeral
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Julian Darío Gutierrez)
item.description: Original post available here At your funeral, friends and family will argue over who gets your belongings. People will talk about the food and the venue. Your life will be summarized in 2-3 paragraphs. Conversations will shift from your life to their lives. Your friends will drive away thinking about what’s next on their to-do list. Some people won’t be able to make it because “something came up." And most of the people you know today won’t even be there.

item.title: If you seek..
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Julian Darío Gutierrez)
item.description: Original post available here If you seek success, cultivate discipline, not pleasure. If you seek strength, embrace struggle, not comfort. If you seek wealth, value creation, not consumption. See also: If you want.. 15 December 2024 Repost Challenges Fitness Fulfillment Growth Meditation Passion Peace Strenght

item.title: If you want..
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Julian Darío Gutierrez)
item.description: Original post available here If you want strength, train. If you want peace, meditate. If you want growth, challenge yourself. If you want fulfillment, pursue your passion. See also: If you seek.. 10 March 2025 Repost Discipline Pleasure Strenght Success

item.title: Are you a boobs or an ass guy?
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Julian Darío Gutierrez)
item.description: Rogan: “Alright, Mr. Trump, the people have been dying to know: Are you a boobs or an ass guy?” Trump: “Joe, that’s a tremendous question. Now, lots of people, they’re boobs people. And I respect that. Boobs are incredible. When I was president, we had the best boobs, folks.… pic.twitter.com/yRwRM5mbFY — Carnivore Aurelius ©🥩 ☀️🦙 (@AlpacaAurelius) October 27, 2024
